title: Active Play Days
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(event_timestamp)) AS total FROM LoadGame WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} unique calendar day(s) with recorded journal activity during the report period. Days played is the simplest measure of dedication — even a handful of active days in a week shows real commitment to the galaxy, and a full run of consecutive sessions is worth acknowledging as the habit it is.
details.help: LoadGame provides one entry per game session; distinct dates gives unique play days. total drives the title.

tagLines: Active play day count compiled from journal session records. Engagement calendar summarised.
Each day in this count was a day you chose to be out there. That adds up.
The galaxy waited. You showed up. More than once, apparently.
